challenges.title: Responsive Image Gallery
challenges.description: Create a gallery with 6 images that use srcset to serve appropriate sizes.
challenges.instructions: Build a 3-column desktop / 2-column tablet / 1-column mobile gallery. Each image should use srcset with 3 widths.
hints: Set width and height attributes for CLS prevention

challenges.title: Hero Image with Art Direction
challenges.description: Create a hero section that uses different image crops for mobile, tablet, and desktop.
challenges.instructions: Use the <picture> element to serve: mobile (portrait crop 3:4), tablet (square 1:1), desktop (landscape 16:9).
hints: Use <source media='(min-width: X)'> for each breakpoint
Ensure the has a fallback src
Use object-fit: cover on the img

challenges.title: Full Image Optimization Pipeline
challenges.description: Build a page that demonstrates complete image optimization: format selection (AVIF/WebP/JPEG), resolution switching, art direction, lazy loading, and CLS prevention.
challenges.instructions: Create a page with a hero, gallery, and article images that implement all responsive image best practices.
hints: Combine <picture> with type for format selection
Use image-set() for CSS background images
Add fetchpriority='high' to hero, loading='lazy' to galleries
Use aspect-ratio + object-fit for all image containers
